examples: Unlike fashion's embrace of playful dissimulation and seduction, this beauty practice instead insists on correcting precisely measured flaws.
You clearly love Ms. Yu, why don't want dissimulation!
The thief intruded into the house with caution and dissimulation.
Years from now, when historians seek an overarching concept to define our times, they could do worse than refer to it as the Age of Dissimulation.
